chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-950 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 23.09.2025 M/s. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani and Hayat Muhammad Khan, Advocates for the Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. ------ After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the petitioner does not wish to press this petition. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh, present in the Court in connection with some other matters, waives notice of instant petition and raised no objection. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
